prompt: Create a dramatic manga-style character poster on an aged off-white paper background, designed like a JoJo-inspired Stand profile page with heavy ink lines, screentone texture, painterly shading, and exaggerated comic energy. The layout is vertical, with a dense information panel on the left and the main figures dominating the center and right. At the top left, large serif English title text reads "LEVERAGE INFINITY" under smaller Japanese text "スタンド名:". Below it, a left-column profile card contains 6 visible info lines with Japanese labels and values: "スタンド使い名:" with the value "1-sphere", "性別: 不詳", "見た目:" followed by a short Japanese description, "年齢: 不詳", "身長: 96cm", and "職業: 市場の条省・養分". Beneath that, add a framed ability box titled "スタンド能力" containing several lines of Japanese body text and a bold English catchphrase at the bottom reading exactly: "Choose... TO THE MOOOOON!! Or face the MARGIN CAAAAALL!!". At the lower left, add a framed radar chart section titled "スタンドパラメータ" with 5 labeled stats around the graph: "破壊力 B", "持続力 C", "成長性 A", "スピード C", and "人念力 B"; fill the radar graph with a translucent pink polygon. The main illustration shows 2 stacked figures: a humanoid Stand above and a pig-like user below. The Stand is tall, metallic, and menacing, with a mushroom-cap helmet head in glossy red with white spots, circular gold-and-pink ear-like side discs, a segmented chrome-and-brass body, muscular but sleek mechanical arms, and a pink pig-snout emblem on the chest. Its face area is obscured by a rectangular censor blur. It reaches one articulated hand toward the viewer in an aggressive foreshortened pose. Around the Stand’s upper body, place 3 large stylized sound-effect glyphs reading "ゴゴゴ" in purple and black. On the far right, add a jagged speech or impact shape with 4 stacked lines of bold Japanese text reading "レヴァ", "レヴァ", "レヴァ", "レヴァ!!". Behind both figures, erupting pink-purple aura flames and floating rock fragments create intense supernatural energy. The lower figure is a short, squat, pig-bodied character standing wide-legged, with pink skin, small hoof-like feet, a yellow-green neckerchief, and a huge mushroom cap hat in red with white spots and a thick yellow underside rim; the torso area is obscured by a large rectangular censor blur. The pig points outward with one hand and holds a woven basket in the other hand containing 3 visible items: 1 blue heart-shaped object and 2 small round produce-like objects. Keep the composition theatrical and bizarre, combining grotesque humor, market-speculation parody, and high-impact manga poster aesthetics.
